entities.name: MILLETS
entities.description: Small-seeded cereal crops predominantly cultivated in Asia and Africa, known for stress tolerance and nutritional superiority

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: Region where millets are predominantly cultivated

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: Region where millets are predominantly cultivated

entities.name: MINIMAL WATER REQUIREMENT
entities.description: A characteristic of millets that makes them an excellent alternative to major staple foods

entities.name: STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: A characteristic of millets that allows them to grow in adverse conditions

entities.name: ADAPTATION TO MARGINAL LANDS
entities.description: The ability of millets to grow in low-quality soils

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL SUPERIORITY
entities.description: The higher nutritional value of millets compared to other cereal crops

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach using molecular markers to speed up genomic selection and crop improvement

entities.name: NEXT-GENERATION SEQUENCING
entities.description: High-throughput DNA sequencing used to support marker-assisted breeding

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A method for selecting genotypes based on genome-wide markers to improve traits

entities.name: GERMPLASM RESOURCE ANALYSIS
entities.description: The analysis of genetic resources to identify useful alleles

entities.name: ALLELE MINING
entities.description: The process of searching for specific beneficial alleles within a germplasm

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: A method used to identify the genomic regions associated with quantitative traits

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE MARKER-TRAIT ASSOCIATION
entities.description: A method to link molecular markers with specific phenotypic traits across the genome

entities.name: GENE TAGGING
entities.description: The process of identifying a gene associated with a specific trait

entities.name: FINE MAPPING
entities.description: A high-resolution mapping technique to narrow down the location of a gene

entities.name: OMICS
entities.description: Advanced biological studies including genomics, proteomics, and metabolomics

entities.name: GENOMICS STUDIES
entities.description: Studies focused on the structure, function, and mapping of genomes

entities.name: GENOME EDITING
entities.description: A technique for making precise changes to the DNA of an organism

entities.name: TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: The process of introducing foreign genetic material into a cell

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: The use of molecular markers to select for desired traits in a breeding program

entities.name: NUTRIENT FORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the nutritional value of millets

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of millets to withstand and recover from climate-related stresses

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL INSECURITY
entities.description: A major global concern regarding the lack of access to nutritious food

entities.name: MOLECULAR REGULATION
entities.description: The processes by which gene expression is controlled to produce specific traits

entities.name: GENOMIC RESOURCES
entities.description: The data and tools required for successful genome editing and improvement
